meaning: adj.(指时间)凑巧的、恰好的,(指行动或事件)及时、适宜的
examples: The timing of the meetings was opportune.
I believe that I have arrived at a very opportune moment.
The offer could not have come at a more opportune moment.
It is a win-win-win for producers, consumers, and taxpayers at a most opportune time.
Opportunity obviously never gets old, and beauty is always opportune flourishing in its own season.
